title: AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (v), PAGE 476, SUBPARAGRAPH THIRTY, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE DEL SUR, PARAGRAPH "c" SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED ONE.

chunks.text:
H. No. 9709 / 62 OG No. 18, 2964 (May 2, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4185, April 21, 1965 ]

AN ACT AMENDING ITEM (v), PAGE 476, SUBPARAGRAPH THIRTY, FOR THE PROVINCE OF LEYTE DEL SUR, PARAGRAPH "c" SECTION TWO OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED TWENTY-SEVEN HUNDRED ONE.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item (v), page four hundred seventy-six, subparagraph thirty, for the Province of Leyte del Sur, paragraph "c," Section two of Republic Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred one is hereby amended to read as follows:

"(v)

Aid to the Municipality of Hinundayan for construction, improvement and/or repair of municipal projects............................................

P5,000.00"

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, April 21, 1965.
